steps.t: Glatharn is located in Tham Lumren. Thalathril has suggested you offer your assistance to Glatharn.
Glatharn is located in Tham Lumren. You should bring the twisted armbands to Glatharn.
Twisted rotroot can be found along the banks of the rivers that border the Angle. Glatharn has asked you to collect a bouquet of twisted rotroot.
Glatharn is located in Tham Lumren. You should bring the twisted rotroot flowers to Glatharn.
The pyre is in Tham Lumren, in the eastern Angle. Glatharn has asked you to add the twisted rotroot and armbands to the pyre.
Glatharn is located in Tham Lumren. You should talk to Glatharn.
